quotes.text: Get it twisted. If you lock in you can do anything. Your actions impact nothing. Your fate is predetermined. The only thing you can change is your reaction to it. You can do anything you set your mind to. The world is a playground designed for you and only you.
quotes.author: The Library of Letourneau

quotes.text: The stars don't look bigger, but they do look brighter.
quotes.author: Sally Ride

quotes.text: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: The beautiful thing about learning is that nobody can take it away from you.
quotes.author: B.B. King

quotes.text: Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.
quotes.author: Mathatma Gandhi

quotes.text: The more that you read, the more things you will know. The more that you learn, the more places you'll go.
quotes.author: Dr. Seuss

quotes.text: A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: Fall seven times, stand up eight.
quotes.author: Japanese Proverb

quotes.text: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
quotes.author: Robert Collier

quotes.text: Our greatest weakness lies in giving up. The most certain way to succeed is always to try just one more time.
quotes.author: Thomas A. Edison
